en: How big is your dick? How big is my dick?
What? I mean, I think it's fine.
It depends. I mean, there's a lid for every pot.
I mean, if I was fucking your mum, it'd be like throwing a sausage up an alleyway.
ko: 괜찮은 것 같아. 경우에 따라 다르지. 뚜껑 맞는 냄비가 있는 법이야.
네 엄마랑 하면 골목에 소시지 던지는 격이겠지만.

en: I bet you fucking walked out, didn't you, mate?
I would say... I would say... I would say I've had no complaints.
You know that phrase a lot of people say, I've had no complaints? I've had complaints.
I once... I slept with two... I had a threesome with two WNBA players.
Very tall basketball players from America.
ko: 그 표현 많이들 하잖아 "불만 없었어". 나는 불만 있었어.

en: And they accused me of fingering them weirdly.
Just finishing that off. That's attention to detail there.
ko: WNBA 선수 두 명이랑 쓰리섬을 했는데. 아주 키 큰 미국 농구 선수들.
WNBA 선수 두 명이랑 쓰리섬을 했는데. 아주 키 큰 미국 농구 선수들.
